title: Technoblade Backdrop
description: Turns the panorama of the main menu into Technoblade fanart
body: This pack changes the panorama on the main menu to fanart of the legend Technoblade. The pack changes the panorama and nothing else. If you want to donate to curing saracoma visit [here.](https://curesarcoma.org/ways-to-help/honor-memorial-giving/dedications/technoblade/) If you want to know where I got the art from go [here.](https://wallpaper.mob.org/pc/gallery/tag=technoblade%20(youtuber)/)
